scene_summary: Bright sunlit bedroom, roughly 3-3.5m wide, with white painted walls and a warm honey-toned hardwood floor. A double bed with white polka-dot bedding sits centrally against the camera-far wall, flanked by a white three-drawer nightstand (camera-left) and a wooden side table (camera-right). A large multi-pane window dominates the camera-left/far wall behind the bed; framed pictures hang on the left and right walls.
polygon_brief: rectangular room shot down its length toward the far wall; large window on the camera-left/far wall behind the bed, framed art on both side walls, no visible doorway (likely behind camera)

openings_hint.notes: large multi-pane window behind the bed on the camera-far wall, bright daylight flooding in
not visible in frame; inferred — entry presumed behind camera

scale_prior.reasoning: Full-size adult double bed and standard three-drawer nightstand imply a normal adult-scaled bedroom.
